name: wix
description: Codex plugin for Wix site operations, API workflows, and publishing readiness.

interface.shortDescription: Build, manage, and automate Wix sites faster.
interface.longDescription: Helps plan and execute Wix tasks across site setup, content updates, catalog operations, and production launch checks using practical API-first workflows.
defaultPrompt: List my Wix sites and summarize which one is best to update for this request.
Create a step-by-step plan to update my Wix pages, SEO metadata, and forms.
